goal: Better mental health support for students

idea.description: A mobile app that connects students with trained mental health professionals through AI-facilitated SMS messaging and community hub integration, leveraging public transit routes to facilitate in-person sessions for those who prefer face-to-face interaction.
idea.revenue_model: Subscription-based model offering monthly access to premium features and expert-driven resources.

refinement.refined_goal: Provides accessible, technology-mediated mental health support tailored to individual students' needs.
refinement.reasoning: Original goal focused on "better" mental health support; this refined goal addresses the actual need for more effective and personalized support.

goal: Provides accessible, technology-mediated mental health support tailored to individual students' needs.

idea.description: A mobile app providing personalized mental health coaching and resources tailored to students' lifestyles, using gamification, rewards, and community support. Users can earn 'eco-points' by completing mindfulness exercises and sharing eco-friendly habits, redeemable for discounts on sustainable products and services.
idea.revenue_model: Partnering with eco-friendly businesses to offer exclusive discounts in exchange for user engagement
idea.novelty_explanation: EcoMind integrates gamification and rewards to motivate students towards mental wellness, distinct from generic mindfulness apps.

refinement.refined_goal: Provides accessible, technology-mediated mental health support tailored to individual students' sustainable lifestyles and eco-awareness.
refinement.reasoning: The original goal focused on individual mental health needs, while this refined goal incorporates a broader aspect of sustainability, addressing the deeper need for environmentally conscious well-being.

goal: Provides accessible, technology-mediated mental health support tailored to individual students' sustainable lifestyles and eco-awareness.

idea.description: A meal kit service that sources ingredients from local, sustainable farms and reduces food waste by upcycling imperfect produce. Each weekly box includes recipes tailored to reduce carbon footprint while promoting eco-awareness.
idea.revenue_model: Subscription fees for monthly delivery of curated meal kits with a focus on locally sourced, seasonal ingredients
idea.novelty_explanation: Unlike generic meal kit services, EcoFreshBox prioritizes sustainability and waste reduction through its unique sourcing model and upcycling practices.

refinement.refined_goal: Provides personalized, technology-mediated mental health support for sustainable lifestyle habits and eco-awareness.
refinement.reasoning: The original goal missed the need for tailored emotional support within eco-conscious lifestyles, whereas this revised goal addresses both physical and mental well-being aspects.
